title: Message/set reactions: add and remove emoji reactions
description:
Add reaction management to Message/set in methods/message.rs:
- PatchObject update on reactions map: add entry (emoji -> [reactionSet]), remove entry
- Reaction set semantics: each user has at most one reaction per emoji per message
- Handle SetError: invalidProperties
- Fixture test: add reaction, remove reaction

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/message_set_reaction_*.json
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
